comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Implemented the explicit summary/content contract. add/update now require both fields, new writes reject summary==content and duplicate summaries, prompt injection remains summary-only, and /memories surfaces persisted entries that still need summary repair. Current local repair scan still flags: vlzq-x9EfmhT, trbB5k739qji, M_PBeelKs_mU, 42KBplu1QRJp, kzk9K1npc52x, -6KBrmLDiSLc, nYTlqJXf3SHG, -f7dljUr6Oj8, H9zkVS7f26fm, BkTgV22Kw1F2, cvhMbLKXy_5X.
